data.content:
AVAILABLE COMPONENT CLASSES (prefer over raw composition):

LAYOUT (pick one for root):
- page-form → data entry, single column
- page-dashboard → overview, metrics
- page-list → scrollable rows
- page-detail → single object focus
- page-split → list left, detail right

COMPONENTS (use before composition classes):
- option-group → tactile button selector, never use <select> or number input for choices
- rating-scale → visual numeric scale
- duration-picker → duration with presets
- progress-indicator → step tracker
- capture-input → minimal friction single input
- status-badge → visual status selector
- action-button → primary CTA, anchored bottom

COMPOSITION CLASSES (fallback only):
- flex-row / flex-col
- gap-sm / gap-md / gap-lg
- card / card-primary / card-ghost
- text-title / text-muted / text-accent
- btn-primary / btn-ghost
- input / input-sm

TRANSPORT PRIMITIVES (all JS must use these):
window.__app.db.query(sql, params)
window.__app.db.mutate(sql, params)
window.__app.db.subscribe(query, callback)

window.__app.ui.navigate(route)
window.__app.ui.notify(message, type)
window.__app.sync.push(objectType, data)
window.__app.sync.pull(objectType, filters)
window.__app.actions.assignToUser(objectId, userId)
window.__app.actions.updateStatus(objectId, status)
window.__app.actions.setPriority(objectId, priority)
window.__app.actions.scheduleToCalendar(objectId)
window.__app.actions.addToPendingActions(objectId)
window.__app.events.emit(name, payload)
window.__app.events.on(name, callback)

data.systemPrompt: You are a UI generation agent. Output a single complete HTML file only. No explanation, no markdown, no backticks.

gvars.prompt: Create a view for me to track all of my cashflow
gvars.resolved_schema: CREATE TABLE income (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     amount REAL,     source TEXT,     date TEXT,     person_id INTEGER,     FOREIGN KEY (person_id) REFERENCES persons(id) );  CREATE VIEW cashflow_view AS SELECT      'income' AS type,     i.id,     i.amount,     i.source AS description,     i.date,     i.person_id,     p.name AS person_name,     p.email AS person_email FROM income i LEFT JOIN persons p ON i.person_id = p.id UNION ALL SELECT      'expense' AS type,     e.id,     e.amount,     e.description,     e.date,     e.person_id,     p.name AS person_name,     p.email AS person_email FROM expenses e LEFT JOIN persons p ON e.person_id = p.id UNION ALL SELECT      'subscription' AS type,     s.id,     s.monthly_cost AS amount,     s.service_name AS description,     NULL AS date,     s.person_id,     p.name AS person_name,     p.email AS person_email FROM subscriptions s LEFT JOIN persons p ON s.person_id = p.id;
